resources.string: Double-tap volume down to toggle the control panel
Accessibility helper: double-tap volume down to toggle the control panel
Configuration imported successfully. Restart the app for all settings to take effect.
Enabling debug mode will restart the service to record detailed logs.\n\nPlease reproduce the issue after restart; all related logs will be captured.
Re-extract from the bundled resource pack
Automatically check for app and resource updates at launch
Choose stable or beta release channel
Package all logs into a ZIP file to share
Record detailed log information when enabled
Choose how the app obtains system permissions
Hold ESC to pause the game while deploying operators for higher precision. Disable if ESC injection misbehaves or some operators are not placed correctly; deployment will fall back to plain swipe
Export all settings and task configurations to a file
Restore settings and task configurations from a file
Press volume up + down together to toggle the panel
Tap the floating ball to toggle the panel
%1$s is unavailable. Please check that the corresponding service is running
Current resolution is not 16:9. Please use background task or adjust the resolution
Background mode requires Android 11 or later. Please use foreground mode.
Clear all error logs? This action cannot be undone.
Name must be at most 20 characters
The current stage name differs from the navigation stage name. Verify that navigation will still work correctly.
Main Theme / Story Collection / Side Story
%1$s does not support Copilot set import
Local file paths are not supported yet. Please enter a Copilot code
Please import files from the Background Task page
Import failed: unable to parse file
Imported %1$d tasks from %2$d Copilot codes (%3$d failed to load)
Request to the network service failed!
Added %1$d tasks to the battle list
The current tab does not support battle list
Selected task from the battle list: %1$s
Copilot is empty. Load a homework first
The selected Copilot does not match the current tab
Using "Battle list", but no tasks have been added
Using "Battle list", mixing different Copilot types is not supported
Copilot tasks with empty names exist
You\'re using "Battle list" to execute a single task, which is not recommended. For single tasks, run them directly instead.
Thanks for the rating!\nComments are now open on the website. Feel free to leave one there.
The background task page depends on the %1$s service. This prompt will keep showing until access is granted.
MaaService terminated unexpectedly. Please try restarting
Game process is not running or was killed unexpectedly
A task is running. Close the app anyway?

When enabled, the screen will fully turn off for maximum power saving.\n• Wake-up: press the power button twice (the lock screen lights up first, then unlock).\n• Screen-saver mode: if disabled, a screen-saver clock is shown so you can monitor task progress and battery at any time.
Download resources from the official GitHub repository. Suitable for users with a stable network connection; always serves the latest version.

is an independent third-party acceleration service. It is a paid service, not charged by MAA.

Its operating cost is covered by subscription revenue; part of the revenue supports project development. Subscribing to a CDK unlocks high-speed downloads and helps sustain development.

A CDK is required when Mirror酱 is selected as the source.
Resources are already up to date
App is already up to date
This app depends on the Shizuku service. Shizuku was not detected on your device; please install it first.
Shizuku is installed but the service is not running. Please open Shizuku and start the service.
Sui is providing the Shizuku service with root privileges. MaaMeow may not work correctly; please verify by actual testing.
Got issues or suggestions? Join the QQ group to discuss
⭐ Star us if you like it
Emulator resolution not supported, please set a resolution of at least 1280x720 with a 16:9 aspect ratio; 1280x720 or 1920x1080 is recommended
Failed to obtain emulator resolution. It is recommended to restart the emulator and ADB, or restart the computer, or consider switching to another emulator
Reconnection failed. The connection is down!
Screencap failed. If it happens repeatedly, try to restart or change the emulator!
Touch mode is not available, please go to ｢Settings - Connection｣ to switch to a different touch mode.
Too many battles ahead: %1$s, restarting route
Failed to open the client. Please check the configuration file
Operators of the following Operator groups are missing:
Additional custom Operator name invalid: %1$s, please check spelling
Proxy failed too many times, task stopped
Currently using no-save task mode. Please manually delete existing save and try again. If you wish to keep the save, please consider switching modes.
Current task mode requires you to have a save with craftable items. Please consider switching modes.
Combat with Support to earn Credits
Product does NOT match the configuration.
Failed to match Operator groups, group list:
Auto-switched to the next custom infrast plan, effective next run
No recruitment permit, trying to refresh Tags

Doctor! 
Purchasing only discounted items has caused an overflow in credits! 
Be cautious of wasting credits!
Remaining credits:
Completed %1$s battles, will execute %2$s multiplier proxy next time, will complete %3$s battles after entering, exceeds %4$s limit, will not enter battle
Unsupported stage, please check the stage name or go to ｢Settings - Update - Resource update｣ and try updating the resource version!
Select a task on the left to rename it, delete it, and more.
Use \"Add Task\" on the left to append a new action to the end of the script.
Select a task on the left to adjust its execution parameters here.
Long-press and drag task items on the left to reorder them freely.
Delete profile \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Tap \"Start Task\" below to scan owned operator data.
After recognition, you can review owned / not owned operators and export the result.
\"Favorite\" marked operators may not be recognized
Some homework requires specific modules or other prerequisites.\nEnabling this option skips those checks, but may cause the homework to fail.
Using one substitute is fine. Missing two or more usually means you should switch homework.

Only supported in the following modes:
 1. Main Theme: Navigate within the same chapter
 2. Side Story: Navigate within the current page (Normal / EX / S cannot jump across pages)
 3. Story Collection: Navigate within the current page
 4. Paradox Simulation: Start from the operator list
Please start from the corresponding screen. Cross-chapter navigation is not supported.

When "Battle list" is enabled, selecting a single homework automatically adds it to the list.

1. Make sure the loaded homework matches the selected stage type before starting.
2. Main Theme, Story Collection, Side Story: start from the screen with the blue "Start" button in the bottom right.
3. SSS: multiple built-in homework files are in resource/copilot. Form your squad manually first, then start from the screen with the "Start Deployment" button in the bottom right. It can be used together with "Loop Times".
4. Paradox Simulation: after selecting skills, start from the skill selection screen with the "Start Simulation" button. For ½-star operators without skills, start from the screen with the bottom-right "Start Simulation" button. If using "Battle list", start from the operator list page.
5. Other Activities: only single homework and regular Copilot settings are supported. Start directly from the target stage screen. Set import and battle list are not supported.
6. When using support units, turn off "Auto Squad" and "Battle list". Select operators manually, then start from the squad screen with the "Mission Start" button.
7. Operators marked as "Favorite" may affect "Auto Squad" recognition and selection. Consider removing favorites before using Auto Squad, or turn it off and add missing operators manually if prompted.
8. Copilot codes can be entered in the input box:
● Tap "Read Homework" to load a single homework.
● Tap "Read Set" to import a homework set (Main Theme / Story Collection / Side Story, Paradox Simulation).
9. Battle list:
● After loading homework, check that the stage name below is correct (for example, CV-EX-1).
● The add normal / add challenge buttons can be used to append tasks (challenge is only for Main Theme).
● Use "Clear List" / "Clear Unchecked" to tidy the queue quickly.
● Start from a screen where the target stage name is visible. Cross-chapter navigation is not supported.
● The queue stops automatically if sanity is insufficient, battle fails, or the clear is not 3-star.
Automatically spend credits on items in the Credit Store.
Combat with Support to earn Credits

Combat with Support Unit in OF-1 after Visit Friends to earn 30 credits.\nThis function is invalid when the stage is selected as \"Cur/Last\".\nDo not enable it if OF-1 from Heart of Surging Flame is not unlocked.
No valid combat stage could be resolved from the current combat task. Support OF-1 will be skipped this time.
Support combat requires an available support unit in your friend list.
Drag to adjust purchase priority. Items closer to the top are bought first.
Reorder mode is enabled. Long-press list items to change priority, then tap the check button to exit.
Enable reorder mode to change priority order. Tap × to remove an item.
* Items in the priority list are purchased in order.
* Blacklisted items will not be purchased unless overflow purchase is enabled.
* Support combat grants extra daily credits, but consumes friend support chances.
Blacklisted items will not be purchased unless \"Ignore blacklist if credits overflow\" is enabled.
Enter an item name you do not want to buy
Wait for sanity recovery before acting, then start when sanity is close to overflowing. Ineffective if sanity potion use is unlimited.
Support manual stage code entry and common aliases (for example, Lungmen Dollars → CE-6).
Automatically use an alternative stage when the primary stage is unavailable.
Unlimited use of expiring (<N hours) sanity potion
Prioritize sanity potions expiring within the configured time.
Use sanity potions that expire this week within 48H before the activity ends
When an activity is about to end within 2 days, automatically use sanity potions expiring this week.
Hide stages that are currently unavailable from the stage list.
When the game disconnects, MAA will try to reconnect automatically and continue the battle.

• AUTO:
Automatically detect the maximum proxy multiplier for the stage while keeping sanity potion usage from overflowing sanity.

• Numeric (1~6):
Execute with the configured multiplier.
If current sanity is insufficient to complete the configured multiplier (for example, only enough for 5 runs but set to 6), battle cannot start.
Likewise, if remaining run count is insufficient for the configured multiplier, battle cannot start.

• Do not switch:
Do not change the in-game proxy multiplier setting.
When stage is closed, reset to
Executes the first open stage. If all stages are closed, skips the current task.\nCurrent execution: %1$s
Manual stage code entry supports common aliases.\nFor example: Lungmen Dollars → CE-6, EXP → LS-6.
For example: CE-6 or Lungmen Dollars
%1$s is not open today. An alternative stage will be used.
When enabled, this task only runs on selected days (based on server time, with reset at 04:00).
After enabling this option, the Originium usage setting will be saved.\nThis may cause accidental Originium consumption, so use it carefully.
This setting is not saved and will reset to off the next time the app starts.

The shift rotation logic is exactly the same as the in-game \"Queue Rotation\" button at the bottom right of the base.\nWhen any operator in the current shift reaches 0 mood, the entire shift switches to the next one.\nUse \"Custom Infrastructure Config\" if you need a custom rotation schedule.
Please import custom configuration files in background mode.

If \"Base Schedule\" has execution time configured, it will not switch automatically before the \"Base Shift\" task starts or during task execution. It stays in the state at Link Start! and only switches when idle or after the task is completed.

Only some plans in this custom infrastructure config have time periods configured, which may cause unexpected behavior. If you want time-based shift switching, make sure every plan has a period configured; otherwise leave them all empty.
When custom shift switching is enabled, this field only applies to autofill and rooms that use worker groups.
Check the facilities that should be swapped.\nThe order of facilities represents shift priority.
Use free dorm slots for trust
Do not move stationed operators into dorms
When enabled, operators such as Irene will not be removed from the Training Room, but Workshop operators also will not enter dorms.
Credit collection from message board in Reception Room
Current mode is foreground. Switch to background mode first.
Collect daily and weekly mission rewards
Conduct the daily free single pull from the limited banner
If no free pull is available, it will be skipped
Collect the daily Orundum reward from the Lucky Strips
Collect the daily Orundum reward from the mining permit
Tap Start to scan the current depot items and quantities.
After recognition, you can export to Penguin Stats planner / Arknights Toolbox format.
Tap Start to recognize current recruitment tags and calculate possible operator combinations

Target account to switch to. Leave blank to disable. Enter the text shown on the login screen, for example 123****4567 or 1234; partial match is supported. Only Official and Bilibili servers are supported. Login-account switching is not supported.
Use up to N sanity potions
Battle count %1$d is not divisible by proxy multiplier %2$d, so sanity may not be fully consumed
Stop combat after collecting the target amount of material
This feature does not automatically calculate the optimal stage. Please choose the stage manually.
· Resource collection event is active (all resource stages are open)
Ignore blacklist when credits are about to overflow
When credits are about to overflow, force-buy blacklisted items to avoid waste
Only buy discounted credit shop items
Note: This may still cause credit overflow. Non-discounted whitelisted items will still be bought.
Stop buying when credits drop below 300
Whitelisted items will still be bought even below 300 credits.
No priority items yet\nTap the button below to add one
This option is not saved and must be checked again before each run
Maximum number of recruitments per task run
Additional Tags are not selected by default
If higher ★ tags appear, always select 3 tags
Pick as many high-star Tags as possible
When only 3★ operators can be matched, as many preferred tags as possible will be selected
Continue trying to refresh Tags without recruitment permit
Keep 1★ tag and skip this slot
If enabled, when a 1★ tag is detected, skip this recruitment slot (keep default 9h); if disabled, the 1★ tag will be ignored
Farm prosperity points by crafting support props; an existing save is required
Support for Reclamation Algorithm is still under development. Please keep the following in mind.
Farm points by repeatedly entering and exiting stages (existing saves may be deleted)
1. The task stops automatically after max points are reached and outputs \"Task completed\"
2. Do not use this when there are operators in the Reclamation squad
3. Check and delete save data manually to avoid MAA deleting a valuable save
4. Navigation is not implemented yet, so the task cannot start outside Reclamation mode
5. If an error occurs or the task completes before max points are reached, please submit a GitHub issue
Farm points through crafting with an existing save (Advanced Settings)
1. It must be the first day after settlement, and there must be no enemy attacks entering the stationed area for the next three days
2. You must start from the overworld screen where the stationed area is visible
3. If the craftable amount is exactly a multiple of 99, it may get stuck. Use some materials before saving

Relaunch Anchor RA-1

Reward estimate: ~159 tokens + coordination points per run, ~2 min 10 sec per round

Operator requirement: None

Prerequisite: Clear RA-1 in the main story

Open RA-1 on the map and start the task when "Start Construction" appears at the bottom-right to loop automatically

Note: If you have unlocked technologies related to starting with extra items, please dismantle the facilities in the base that cause starting with extra items, such as Food Supply Stations, Drink Supply Stations, Animal Pens, etc.

Task flow: Automatically executes farming, construction, resource delivery, and settlement loop

Relaunch Anchor RA-4

Reward estimate: ~417 tokens + coordination points per run, ~1 min 40 sec per round

Operator requirement: Wis'adel (support unit allowed)

Prerequisite: Clear RA-4 in the main story

Open RA-4 on the map and start the task when "Start Construction" appears at the bottom-right to loop automatically

Note: If you have unlocked technologies related to starting with extra items, please dismantle the facilities in the base that cause starting with extra items, such as Food Supply Stations, Drink Supply Stations, Animal Pens, etc.

Task flow: Automatically executes planning management, construction, resource delivery, and settlement loop

⚠️ This strategy has not been fully refined yet, issues may occur during execution

Reward estimate: ~500 tokens + coordination points per run, ~3 min per round

Operator requirement: Saintly First Snow (support unit allowed)

Prerequisite:
1. Clear RA-15 in the main story
2. If you have Saintly First Snow, manually open RA-15 and form a squad once. Use 5 Vanguards (no level requirement) + Saintly First Snow, pick her last, then save the squad and exit the stage
3. If you use support Saintly First Snow, make sure Saintly First Snow is on the first page of the Caster support list (consider adding as friend)

Note: If you have unlocked technologies related to starting with extra items, please dismantle the facilities in the base that cause starting with extra items, such as Food Supply Stations, Drink Supply Stations, Animal Pens, etc.

Task flow: Automatically use support operator to execute 60-kill mission
No save (farm prosperity by entering and exiting stages)
Existing save (farm prosperity by crafting props)
Stop after investing N Originium Ingots
Stop when the ingot storage reaches the cap
Investment mode enables shopping, recruitment, and entering floor 2
Use a support unit for the starting operator
Stop after starting exploration N times
Stop when max level is reached
Repeat for the starting operator to reach Elite 2
Only repeat for the starting operator to reach Elite 2, without battle
Separate with English semicolons (;). Leave blank to use the default list.
Repeat the first-floor foreseed foldartal without battle
Start with Life Prioritizing Squad and acquire the cypherboard
Write up to three items and separate them with English semicolons (;)
Gain Experience Points, clear as many nodes as possible
Invest coins and exit automatically after the investment is complete
Grind to obtain Hot Water Kettle or an Elite 2 starting operator
Grind Monthly Squad and clear as far as possible
Grind Deep Investigation and clear as far as possible
Farm collapse paradigms and restart immediately after encountering a non-rare collapse paradigm
Farm Playtime Nodes, enter the cave on floor 1, and restart if the target node does not appear
Slow and Steady Wins the Race
First launch needs to extract resource files. Please wait…
Resource initialization failed: %1$s\n\nCheck available storage space and try again.
Reinitialize resources now?\n\nThis deletes existing resources and extracts them again from the bundled package. If you previously updated resources, those updates will be overwritten.
Optional, required when authentication is enabled
Silent notifications for task completion, errors, and high-rarity recruitment events
Popup notifications for task completion, errors, and high-rarity recruitment events
A new resource version is available: %1$s\n\nUpdating now is recommended to get the latest task configs and feature support.
The game is not running. Continuing may fail immediately. Start anyway?
The game package for the current client type was not detected. Check the client type in Wake Up. Start anyway?
Please select the tasks to run first
The task chain contains different client types (%1$s). Please keep them consistent
There are no executable tasks in the current task chain
Wake Up is not configured and the game is not running. This scheduled run was cancelled
The game package for the current client type was not detected. Check the client type in Wake Up. This scheduled run was cancelled
In background mode, the game must be launched by the Wake Up task. Please close the game and enable \"Start Game\" in Wake Up
Resource loading failed. Try reinitializing resources
MaaCore initialization failed. Restart the app
Failed to set touch mode. Restart the app
The screen is in portrait mode. Switch to landscape before starting
Failed to set display mode. Please try again
Failed to start the virtual display. Check service permissions
Timed out while starting MaaCore. Please try again
MaaCore failed to start. Check the task configuration
The task aborted unexpectedly. Check logs for details
The task has ended. Check logs for details
This task is not supported in the current version
Operator not found. This input will not take effect
Tap the button in the lower-right corner to add one
To ensure scheduled tasks can wake up normally from the background, allow this app to auto-start in system settings.
Create a task profile in the control panel first
Stop the current task, restart the game, and start the new tasks
To ensure scheduled tasks trigger correctly, handle the following items in system settings: %1$s
Add at least one execution time
The execution interval must be at least 1 hour
Scheduled task is about to start
Scheduled task execution and result notifications
Failed to auto-download the app update
Failed to auto-download the resource update
This notice won\'t appear again after confirmation. Please make sure you have read it fully.
